response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that aligns precisely with the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD background (founded Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, taught TDD courses) matches the Vitest/testing emphasis. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or PostgreSQL experience, but the breadth of languages and architecture experience suggests quick ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly matches AI agent development requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Strong testing/TDD culture - built test frameworks, taught TDD/Selenium courses, practices trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in primary stack
Missing Kotlin/Java for backend services (Java mentioned only briefly for robotic arms ~10 years ago)
No PostgreSQL experience shown; database experience is MongoDB/MySQL-focused
